summary: A listenable recording that starts a bit rusty but quickly finds its stride, delivering plenty of juice.
review: The reviewer feels the show is worth hearing despite an uneven opening; the early songs sound a little rusty before the band settles into a stronger groove. No specific comments on the tape source are made, but the performance overall is considered enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) provides a generally positive impression of the music with no technical complaints, but lack of details on recording source limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks about sound clarity or mix; reviewer found it listenable and worth hearing.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening feels a bit rusty, but the band soon finds its stride and delivers a solid performance with plenty of energy.
